jobs.title: Software Engineer, iOS Core Product
jobs.description: Headquarters: Remote The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning. Over 30 million people use Speechify’s text-to-speech products to turn whatever they’re reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify’s text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its App of the Day. Today, nearly 200 people around the globe work on Speechify in a 100% distributed setting – Speechify has no office. These include frontend and backend engineers, AI research scientists, and others from Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, leading PhD p
match_cons: No PHP, Laravel, or backend experience required

jobs.description: Er du klar til at kode fremtiden? 🚀 Vi hos WeCode søger en passioneret udvikler, der elsker at dykke ned i Laravel og React, og som brænder for at bygge AI-native platforme og innovative AI-produkter. Hvis du er hårdtarbejdende, altid sulten efter ny viden, og elsker at have det sjovt mens du knokler, så er det her jobbet for dig! Om os WeCode er en dynamisk og ung virksomhed med base på Nørrebro i København. Vi er tech-nørder i hjertet, der konstant eksperimenterer med de nyeste trends – især inden for AI. Hos os er ingen udfordring for stor; vi finder altid en smart løsning! Vores hverdag er fyldt med højt tempo, stejl læring og masser af latter.
